arts.ttl: 'Don't get me wrong' - Andy Robertson on unseen Arne Slot impact and honest take on Liverpool form
arts.sum: Andy Robertson speaks ahead of Liverpool's Carabao Cup final clash with Newcastle United at Wembley

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye cut-price Raphinha deal; Liverpool plot £100m Alvarez bid
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world.

arts.ttl: Legendary Newcastle striker Malcolm 'Supermac' Macdonald shares an afternoon of tales and ales with CRAIG HOPE - and remembers the last time the Magpies faced Liverpool at Wembley
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW BY CRAIG HOPE: It was in 1975 Supermac ran 100 metres in 10.9 seconds. 'It's 10 metres in 100 seconds these days,' we laugh, shuffling back from a four-hour pub lunch.

arts.ttl: Papers: Barcelona have 'genuine' interest in Liverpool star Diaz
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Liverpool leading chase for Guehi - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are leading the chase for Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi, Real Madrid will attempt to sign Arsenal's William Saliba, Lille striker Jonathan David is attracting interest from Premier League clubs, plus more.

arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy says Arne Slot immersing himself in Liverpool has led to success
arts.sum: The Wales manager won the League Cup in 2012 during his time at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson drops hint on Liverpool future and offers verdict on transfer plans
arts.sum: At the age of 31, Andy Robertson is on the cusp of winning his second Premier League title medal - and will be aiming to lift the Carabao Cup for the third time when the Reds face Newcastle at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Liverpool ace reveals Arne Slot message convinced stars he was perfect Jurgen Klopp replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool were on a pre-season tour in the United States when Arne Slot walked into the training ground in Pittsburgh to tell his squad that his No.1 aim was to eclipse Manchester City and Arsenal

arts.ttl: Newcastle stars projected onto building alongside River Thames by shirt sponsors Sela ahead of Carabao Cup final against Liverpool
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: Residents and nearby offices reported a glare coming through their windows, only to discover giant projections of the likes of Alexander Isak and Bruno Guimaraes.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United: Should Darwin Nunez or Diogo Jota start up front for Arne Slot in EFL Cup final?
arts.sum: Liverpool will take on Newcastle United at Wembley on Sunday in the EFL Cup final, and boss Arne Slot will have a selection dilemma on his hands in the forward line.
